section_name: Corporal David Anthony Gentry Memorial Bridge
text:
(a) The State Highway 6 bridge over the Brazos River in Knox County is designated as the Corporal David Anthony Gentry Memorial Bridge.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Corporal David Anthony Gentry Memorial Bridge and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the bridge.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.152 (Trooper Tom Nipper Memorial Highway) by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 21.001(101), eff. September 1, 2021.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.186 — Corporal David Anthony Gentry Memorial Bridge

(a) The State Highway 6 bridge over the Brazos River in Knox County is designated as the Corporal David Anthony Gentry Memorial Bridge.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Corporal David Anthony Gentry Memorial Bridge and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the bridge.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.152 (Trooper Tom Nipper Memorial Highway) by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 21.001(101), eff. September 1, 2021.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 905 (H.B.3671), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2019.*
